name: Bar-b-q'd Pork Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a 5-quart crockpot.
2. Place the fat in the crockpot and melt it on HIGH until it starts to bubble.
3. Add the meat and turn to coat with the melted fat.
4. Season the meat with the mixture of the last three ingredients: Salt, Chili Powder, Paprika, Pepper.
5. Add all other ingredients: Water, Vinegar, Worcestershire Sauce, Accent, and sliced onions.
6. Cook on LOW for 8-9 hours until the pork is tender and fully cooked.
